summary: Iteration 24 - NENO Exchange CORS/Error Fix Complete. All features working: (1) Platform wallet endpoint returns hot wallet address 0x18CE1930..., (2) Sell with insufficient balance shows proper error 'Saldo NENO insufficiente' NOT generic network error, (3) Buy/Sell/Swap operations work with settlement hashes and BSCScan links, (4) verify-deposit endpoint validates tx_hash format and returns proper errors, (5) CORS configured with allow_credentials=False. Frontend displays all tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token), NENO balance, platform wallet address, and transaction history with settlement hashes.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS fix: allow_credentials=False with allow_origins=['*'] - correct per CORS spec (credentials=true + '*' is forbidden by browsers)
XHR-based HTTP helpers (xhrGet, xhrPost, xhrFetch) bypass Emergent's fetch body interception that was causing 'body stream already read' errors
Platform wallet endpoint derives address from NENO_WALLET_MNEMONIC via eth_account HD wallet
verify-deposit endpoint validates tx_hash format (min 60 chars) and checks on-chain via BSC RPC
Sell/Swap/Offramp operations support both internal ledger and on-chain execution (tx_hash parameter)
On-chain NENO balance reading via wagmi useReadContract for balanceOf on BSC contract 0xeF3F5C1892A8d7A3304E4A15959E124402d69974
MetaMask transaction signing flow implemented via useWriteContract for real on-chain transfers
Error messages properly propagated from backend to frontend (e.g., 'Saldo NENO insufficiente' instead of 'Errore di rete')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified CORS fix and error message propagation. The main bug was Emergent's emergent-main.js script intercepting fetch() and consuming response body for analytics, causing 'body stream already read' errors on 400 responses. Fix: switched to XMLHttpRequest which is not intercepted. Platform wallet: 0x18CE1930820d5e1B87F37a8a2F7Cf59E7BF6da4E. NENO contract: 0xeF3F5C1892A8d7A3304E4A15959E124402d69974. On-chain balance reading and MetaMask signing CANNOT be tested in automation (requires real browser wallet extension).

backend_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/platform-wallet: PASS - Returns address: 0x18CE1930820d5e1B87F37a8a2F7Cf59E7BF6da4E, chain: BSC Mainnet, chain_id: 56
backend_endpoints.POST /api/neno-exchange/sell (insufficie: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Saldo NENO insufficiente: 9674.282 disponibile'
backend_endpoints.POST /api/neno-exchange/buy: PASS - Returns success with settlement_hash, block_number > 90M
backend_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/market: PASS - Returns market info with supported_assets
backend_endpoints.GET /api/neno-exchange/quote: PASS - Returns quote with fee calculation

frontend_ui.NENO Exchange page loads: PASS - All tabs visible (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Off-Ramp, Crea Token)
frontend_ui.Buy operation: PASS - Shows green success banner with settlement hash and BSCScan link
frontend_ui.Sell insufficient balance: PASS - Shows red error banner 'Saldo NENO insufficiente: 9674.282 disponibile' (NOT 'Errore di rete')
frontend_ui.Sell valid amount: PASS - Shows green success banner with settlement hash
frontend_ui.Swap operation: PASS - Shows green success banner with settlement hash
frontend_ui.Transaction history: PASS - Shows recent transactions with settlement hashes and BSCScan links
frontend_ui.No console errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors during operations

mocked_apis.note: On-chain NENO balance reading and MetaMask signing require real browser wallet extension - cannot be tested in Playwright automation. Internal ledger operations are fully functional.

cors_fix_verification.issue: Emergent's emergent-main.js script wraps window.fetch and consumes response body for analytics tracking
cors_fix_verification.symptom: 'body stream already read' errors when trying to read 400 error responses
cors_fix_verification.fix: Switched from fetch() to XMLHttpRequest (xhrGet, xhrPost, xhrFetch helpers) which is not intercepted
cors_fix_verification.cors_config: allow_credentials=False with allow_origins=['*'] - correct per CORS spec

platform_wallet_verification.derivation: From NENO_WALLET_MNEMONIC via eth_account HD wallet
